text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Heya-hey, Trainer! Did you rest up too?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to make the most of my time off, so I
didn't put my name down for any shifts. I haven't
felt this relaxed in ages!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...But I do get antsy when there's nothing to do.
Ahaha, maybe I had a little too much time on my
hands.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
After all that restlessness, I think I need some
good ol' training to set me straight! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only is Ines Fujin in high spirits, but she seems
well rested, too!
